metadata.title: I link therefore iframe
metadata.description: I link therefore iframe Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: This provider uses native markup instead of an iframe, so there are no iframe sizing controls for this preview.
ast.target: 此提供程序使用原生标记而非 iframe，因此此预览没有 iframe 大小调整控件。

ast.name: innerText
ast.target: 宽高比：

ast.target: 匹配笔记宽度（重置大小）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: When enabled, create one folder per set and one Markdown note per card for
ast.target: 启用后，为每个集合创建一个文件夹，为每张卡片创建一个 Markdown 笔记，以实现

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: compatibility. When disabled, save one Markdown file per Quizlet set using the older export format.
ast.target: 兼容性。禁用后，使用旧的导出格式为每个 Quizlet 集合保存一个 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Best-effort export of public Quizlet flashcards to local Markdown when card data is accessible.
ast.target: 当卡片数据可访问时，尽力将公共 Quizlet 闪卡导出到本地 Markdown。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: this setting has general plugin performance implications, and will especially cause stutter when embedding larger Quizlet sets.
ast.target: 此设置会影响插件的整体性能，并且在嵌入较大的 Quizlet 集合时尤其会导致卡顿。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Found bugs or want a feature?
ast.target: 发现错误或想要新功能？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the iframe sizing modal using current values
ast.target: 使用当前值打开 iframe 尺寸调整模态框

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use dark theme for embeds when supported
ast.target: 在支持的情况下为嵌入内容使用深色主题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how the embed behaves before loading
ast.target: 选择嵌入内容加载前的行为方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display an "Open original link" footer below generated embeds
ast.target: 在生成的嵌入内容下方显示“打开原始链接”页脚

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download direct image URLs and replace embed links with local vault files
ast.target: 下载直接图片 URL 并将嵌入链接替换为本地保险库文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For supported platforms (Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest, Telegram, Mastodon, Reddit, TikTok, Imgur, SoundCloud, Spotify, CodePen, Steam), fetch available media images and save them locally
ast.target: 对于支持的平台（Instagram、Facebook、Pinterest、Telegram、Mastodon、Reddit、TikTok、Imgur、SoundCloud、Spotify、CodePen、Steam），获取可用的媒体图片并本地保存

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download a local Markdown copy of the document when embedding a Google Doc (requires the document to be shared with anyone with the link)
ast.target: 嵌入 Google 文档时下载文档的本地 Markdown 副本（要求文档已设置为任何拥有链接的人可访问）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder inside your vault used for downloaded image content
ast.target: 保险库内用于存放下载图片内容的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder inside your vault used for downloaded Google Docs Markdown files
ast.target: 保险库内用于存放下载的 Google 文档 Markdown 文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, download card images found in Quizlet sets and embed them locally in exported notes
ast.target: 启用后，下载在 Quizlet 集合中找到的卡片图片，并在导出的笔记中本地嵌入它们

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder inside your vault used for downloaded Quizlet card exports
ast.target: 保险库内用于存放下载的 Quizlet 卡片导出的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Primary action: refresh every Quizlet set that has a stored quizlet:source marker in your vault.
ast.target: 主要操作：刷新保险库中所有存储了 quizlet:source 标记的 Quizlet 集合。
